name: escape-plan
description: Escape Plan — an intelligent annual-leave planner that generates optimised holiday plans.

scripts.build: npm run build:engine && npm run build:web && npm run build:server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @escape-plan/engine && npm run typecheck --workspace @escape-plan/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @escape-plan/server
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @escape-plan/engine && npm run test --workspace @escape-plan/server && npm run test --workspace @escape-plan/web
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace @escape-plan/engine && npm run test:coverage --workspace @escape-plan/server && npm run test:coverage --workspace @escape-plan/web
